data.content:
Planning notes:
- Remove the redundant overview title/count row and let tabs carry the state counts.
- Extend overview lease info with terminal session identity and agent metadata so active tiles can show age, provider/agent, model, and version.
- Add a tile-level lease action: focus the matching terminal session when sessionId is known; otherwise call the repo-scoped rollback API from a Release button.
- Preserve tab grouping, hidden empty columns, column watermark sizing, id display rules, and beat-open behavior.
